title: Potista
description: Best Pot PvP Pack ever. For Netherite and Diamond Pot
body:
**This is the best Netherite / Diamond Potion PvP Texture Pack you will ever see.**

When i search for Netherite Potion PvP Texture Packs i only found Packs which where really not Default looking. So i took things into my own hands.

After working on it a couple of days i had created the best looking Texturepack ever. 

<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>
All The Cridits are listed inside the Pack in a .txt file

</details>


```
The Texturepack is Default looking. There are still a lot of changes so don't worry if you can't stand 
the default look anymore. The Pack is perfect for Diamond and Netherite Potion PvP

The Pack includes:
- low fire
- lower shield 
- Custom Tools and Swords
- Transparent GUI
- Fancy Crosshair (If you don't like it use an Overlay ore Lunar Client to change it)
- Custom Totem
- Custom Potions
- Better Hearts and Armor Icons
```
